prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7791、9115、8447、9144、11248名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约2100名，基准位次约11248名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为147、151、135、137、132人，呈小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划153人，较2025年扩招约15.9%，扩招幅度较大，理论上竞争有所缓 解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年第27名（近年稳定在23–27名），属于全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面（原校长被查 事件），抖音热度排名第85、评价一般；2024年曾出现录取分断档信号（中关注），2025年重庆某专业录取异常（低关注）；整体声誉偏负面但影响有限；冶金 工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、机械工程A-等13个A-及以上学科，医学与材料学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等均为高热推荐专业，中南大学在这些领域均有招生，对考生吸引力强；江苏省2026年总考生约52.1万人，较2025年约35.8万人增长约45.7%， 按近年比例估算物理类考生约38万人，较2025年26.1万人增长约46%，竞争显著加剧；中南大学位于湖南长沙，在江苏无本省招 生偏好优势；该校在江苏招生占比约21.7%（2025年），属跨省招生中占比最高的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11248名、2026年扩招约15.9%、江苏省物理类考生大幅增长约46%（竞争加剧推高位次）以及声誉偏负面（轻微抵消），预测2026年物理类最低位次约12372名，区间11872–12872名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7791, 9115, 8447, 9144, and 11248, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 2100 compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 11248. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 147, 151, 135, 137, and 132, showing a slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 153, an increase of about 15.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 23–27 in recent years), belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to the former president being investigated), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 85 and average reviews. In 2024, there was a signal of admission score cutoff (medium attention), and in 2025, an abnormal admission for a major in Chongqing (low attention). Overall reputation is slightly negative but with limited impact. It has 13 A- or above disciplines, including Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, etc., with outstanding strengths in medicine and materials.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc., are all highly recommended majors. Central South University enrolls students in these fields, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, an increase of about 45.7% compared to about 358,000 in 2025. Estimated Physics Category examinees are about 380,000, an increase of about 46% compared to 261,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, and has no local enrollment preference advantage in Jiangsu. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 21.7% (2025), making it one of the provinces with the highest cross-provincial enrollment proportions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11248, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 15.9%, the significant increase of about 46% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu (intensified competition pushing rankings higher), and the slightly negative reputation (minor offset), the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 12372, with a range of 11872–12872.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 12372, with a range of 11872–12872. Candidates near the lower end of the range can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Computer Science. Those in the middle of the range should consider Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Software Engineering, and Mathematics as primary choices. Candidates near the upper end of the range can safely choose Tier 3 majors like Materials, Mechanical, and Chemical and Pharmaceutical as backups. Central South University has outstanding strengths in medicine and computer science, so it is recommended to prioritize related majors.
